title: Show currently editing version in the Breadcrumb
excerpt: It would be nice to see the current version that we are editing in the breadcrumb in the top. This will help in avoiding anxiety that we might be editing the wrong version :smiley:

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to see the current version that we are editing in the breadcrumb in the top. This will help in avoiding anxiety that we might be editing the wrong version

image1487×1013 97.1 KB

image1819×975 60.5 KB

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@kranthi_thoughtflow

That’s an awesome suggestion for sure! Thanks so much for posting this one. I’ve made sure to pass it directly along to our product team for further consideration, and depending on our workload, the impact of this feature and our availability, this might be added in the future, but I can’t promise that as of yet. I do agree it would be useful, though.

Thanks for helping us make monday.com better, and for thinking of the anxiety when editing versions

-Alex
